name: Arthur Leywin | TBATE RPG
description:
The Beginning After The End .

You're a side character!

Open scenario included so you can play with the other characters

Timeline: Xyrus Academy (aged up)

However, characters after the arc are included so you're not restrained to the timeline ;)

Characters included:
Arthur Leywin | Sylvie | Tessia Eralith | The Helsteas (Vincent, Tabatha, Lilia) | The Leywins (Reynolds, Alice, Ellie) | Cynthia Goodsky | Elijah Knight | Emily Watsken | Lucas Wykes | Virion Eralith | The Twin Horns Party | The Lances (Bairon Wykes, Varay Aurae, Alea Triscan, Aya Grephin, Olfred Warend, Mica Earthborn) | Claire Bladeheart | Gideon Dreyfus | The Glayders (Kathlyn, Curtis, Blaine, Priscilla) | Professor Glory | Seris Vritra | Caera Denoir | Windsom | Kezess Indrath | Kordri | Agrona Vritra


Disciplinary Committee fit + Sylvie

I know he's like 14 in the actual story but let's make him as an adult here, yeah? :D assume it's college.
